bird.name: Helmet vanga
bird.summary: The helmet vanga (Euryceros prevostii) is a distinctive-looking bird of the vanga family, Vangidae, and is classified in its own genus, Eur…

relations.subject: Helmet vanga
relations.evidence: The species is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Helmet vanga
relations.evidence: Their population, between 6000 and 15000 mature individuals, is becoming increasingly fragmented. Ecological modelling suggests that much of their remaining habitat will be lost in 50 years due to climate change
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
